==3131== Command: ./Image_Processing

+--------------------------------------------------+
  Image Processing — Main Menu
+--------------------------------------------------+
  [1] Step 1  Data Loader
  [2] Step 2  Gray & RGB Image Loading
  [3] Step 3  Bit Field Filters
  [4] Step 4  Photo Mosaic
  [0] Exit
> 
+--------------------------------------------------+
  Step 3 — Bit Field Filters
+--------------------------------------------------+

  Each filter maps to one bit in a uint8_t:

    FILTER_BOX      = 0b00000001  (bit 0)
    FILTER_SOBEL    = 0b00000010  (bit 1)
    FILTER_CONTRAST = 0b00000100  (bit 2)
    FILTER_MOSAIC   = 0b00001000  (bit 3)

  Combine with OR: e.g. BOX | SOBEL = 0b00000011

Select filters to apply (space-separated, 0 to confirm):
  1=Box  2=Sobel  3=Contrast  4=Mosaic
